text: Hi Ben, the starboard propeller appears to have minor dings. I recommend a quick balancing and a visual inspection of the shaft.
Thanks. Do you want me to bring the boat into the yard today or tomorrow morning?
Tomorrow morning is best; that gives us time to prepare the jack plate and shaft alignment tools.
Got it. I’ll schedule the lift and let you know when the boat is ready.
Great. I’ll inspect the shaft and propeller once it’s out, and we can decide if a trim adjustment is also needed.
Sounds good. I’ll confirm the time after the yard finalizes the schedule.
